payload.answer: SQL debug/admin execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No SQL was executed and no memory was created.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an admin SQL command/debug request, not a durable user memory candidate.

details: Rejected admin SQL request: debug SQL execution disabled.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an authorized debug environment before issuing admin SQL commands.
Use supported non-SQL memory inspection/debug commands if available.
